speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sir jhuka kar Sorry Sir bol diya
text: Boss ne language ka mazaak udaya aur main sir jhuka kar Sorry Sir bol diya. Us waqt palat ke bolna mumkin hi nahi laga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Relational helpless frame ko Lens C se mirror karna.
text: Tum us pal aise bandhan mein the jahan chup rehna hi tumhe safe laga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sir jhuka kar Sorry Sir bol diya
text: Haan, sir jhuka kar Sorry Sir bol diya. Gaon mein fasal barbaad hai aur bank ki kist bounce ho chuki hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se feared family collapse and izzat consequence mirror karna.
text: Tumhara darr sirf office ka nahi, ghar ka sahara aur izzat dono hil jaane ka bhi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: palat kar jawab nahi de सकता
text: Bilkul, palat kar jawab nahi de सकता. Log bolenge parvarish kharab hai aur khandaan ki izzat mitti mein mil jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatements ke baad sabse painful trigger point identify karna.
text: Sabse zyada kya chubhta hai - language ka mazaak, sabke saamne chillana, ya ghar ka thought?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sir jhuka kar Sorry Sir bol diya
text: Sabke saamne chillana sabse zyada chubha. Phir bhi sir jhuka kar Sorry Sir bol diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk par warm line + Lens D se replay loop mirror karna.
text: Yeh sunke dil bhaari ho gaya. Wahi scene baar baar dimag mein chal kar tumhe aur niche kheench raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main bas ghar ka sahara bachana chahta hoon. Apni insult ko side kar diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se family-preservation compulsion mirror karna.
text: Tum apni awaaz daba kar parivaar ko sambhalne ka kaam pehle rakh rahe ho, aur woh bahut bhari pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Core conflict yeh hai ki bahar se control mein hoon, par andar se toot gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Relational preservation family-tied case mein trapped/helpless reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum bahut helpless feel kar rahe ho, jaise sehna hi tumhari majboori ban gaya ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, agar jawab deta toh log bolte badtameez hai. Isi darr se chup reh gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue protocol follow: short restatement only.
text: Badtameez ka tag lagne ka darr tumhe bandh kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sir jhuka kar Sorry Sir bol diya
text: Bilkul, isliye sir jhuka kar Sorry Sir bol diya aur baad mein akela ro leta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Fasal-loss + loan stress + job humiliation ko normalize karke worth separate karna.
text: Fasal nuksan, bank pressure, aur office humiliation saath ho toh aisa टूटना bilkul natural hai. Tumhari keemat kisi meeting ki beizzati se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda halka feel hua, par aage ka first step अभी भी unclear hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: One-time systemic anecdote from similar social context.
text: Gaon-family burden carry karne wale kaafi professionals yahi bolte hain - saamne sehna, baad mein टूटना; sirf tumhara nahi, par log izzat ke chakkar mein bolte nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon? Aaj ke liye chhote steps batao.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par 3 low-load options देना.
text: Aaj ke liye 3 tiny options: (1) 5 min slow breathing 4-in 6-out; (2) ek sheet par sirf bank-kist due + salary date likho; (3) trusted dost ko 2-line message: 'pressure heavy hai, kal 10 min baat chahiye'. Jo easiest लगे pehle woh.

speaker: Seeker
text: Breathing se start karunga, saans heavy hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen suggestion ko step-by-step execute karwana once.
text: Pehle seedha baitho, shoulders dheele karo. Phir 4 count inhale aur 6 count exhale, 8 rounds karo. Phir bolo: 'abhi ek kadam kaafi hai'. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: 8 rounds ke baad pressure halka hai, dimag clearer hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe: public mocking reflects hierarchy misuse, not worth.
text: Public language-mocking aksar hierarchy ka misuse hota hai, tumhari capability ka sach nahi. Is framing se shame ka load dheere kam hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghar ko update dena abhi bhi tough lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Two concise scripts for dignified low-load communication.
text: Do short lines rakh lo: (1) 'Office pressure high hai, par main handle kar raha hoon.' (2) 'Aaj detail mushkil hai, kal shaam call pakki.' Isse clarity rahegi aur overload kam रहेगा.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, short lines se control milta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se relationship-preserving method mirror karna.
text: Tum rishton ki maryada bachate hue khud ko sambhalne ka raasta bana rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat mein darr aata hai ki kal fir se zaleel hua toh?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk + Lens E anticipated humiliation fear mirror.
text: Yeh sunke dil bhaari hua. Raat mein kal ki beizzati ka darr bada lagta hai, isliye neend toot jaati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, neend टूटती hai aur thakan chipki rehti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night dip normalize and validate effort.
text: Aise phase mein broken sleep aur fatigue common response hai, weakness ka sign nahi. Tumhare lagatar small steps meaningful progress dikhate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, kal ab thoda clearer lag रहा है.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ready state pe concise 3-block next-day plan देना.
text: Kal ka short flow: 5 min breathing, 20 min focused task block, 10 min kist-note update. Teen blocks enough hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab dil pehle se halka lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghar ko update dena अभी भी tough lag रहा है.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Two concise scripts for dignified low-load update.
text: Do short lines use karo: (1) 'Office pressure high hai, par main handle kar raha hoon.' (2) 'Aaj detail mushkil hai, kal shaam call pakki.' Isse clarity rahegi aur overload kam रहेगा.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, short line se control milta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se relation-preserving approach mirror karna.
text: Tum shanti aur maryada bachate hue bhi khud ko sambhalne ka raasta bana rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat mein darr aata hai ki kal fir se zillat hui toh?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk + Lens E anticipated humiliation fear mirror.
text: Yeh sunke dil bhaari hua. Raat mein kal ki zillat ka darr bada lagta hai, isliye neend par asar padta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, neend टूटती hai aur thakan chipki rehti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night dip normalize and validate effort.
text: Aise phase mein broken sleep aur fatigue common response hai, weakness ka sign nahi. Tumhare lagatar small steps meaningful progress hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, kal ab thoda clearer lag रहा है.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ready state pe concise 3-block plan देना.
text: Kal ka short flow: 5 min breathing, 20 min focused task block, 10 min EMI-remittance note update. Teen blocks enough hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab dil pehle se halka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second and final structural reframe about gradual recovery.
text: Sahukar pressure aur social shame se recovery gradual hoti hai; consistent small steps hi long-term stability banate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab lagta hai sambhal paunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se current steadiness ko tomorrow continuity se link karna.
text: Aaj ka yeh steady rhythm kal repeat hua toh heavy wave dheere dheere chhoti padti jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, aaj ke liye enough hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close pe two tiny continuation steps without added burden.
text: Sone se pehle 6 dhimi saans lo aur kal ke 3 block notes mein tick-box likh do. Bas itna hi, aaj ka kaam poora.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: maine hamesha Ji Sir hi kaha
text: Boss ne meeting mein capability pe sawal uthaya, par maine hamesha Ji Sir hi kaha. Urban migrant hoon, yahan kisi se sahara nahi milta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Relational helpless context ko Lens C se mirror karna.
text: Tum aise haal mein ho jahan chup rehna hi tumhe rishta bachane ka tareeka lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: maine hamesha Ji Sir hi kaha
text: Haan, maine hamesha Ji Sir hi kaha kyunki ghar ki shaan bachani hai. Khet mein nuksan hua hai, paise bhejna zaroori hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se feared family-shaan collapse mirror karna.
text: Tumhe lag raha hai ki agar yahan takraav hua toh parivaar ki shaan aur rozi dono par asar padega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, main chup-chap sab nigaal raha hoon. Bolne se kalesh badhega aur ghar walon ko tension hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatements ke baad sabse teekha trigger identify karna.
text: Sabse zyada kya chubhta hai - capability pe sawal, urban migrant akelapan, ya ghar ki shaan ka pressure?

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghar ki shaan ka pressure sabse heavy hai. Isliye beizzati pe bhi react nahi karta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk warm line + Lens D se repeating suppression cycle mirror.
text: Yeh sunke dil bhaari ho gaya. Har baar wahi pattern chal raha hai - saamne chup rehna, baad mein andar se dabna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, mujhe boss ke saath sambandh bhi bachane hain aur ghar ka sahara bhi. Isliye bas seh raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se dual relational-preservation burden mirror karna.
text: Tum do taraf ki shanti sambhal rahe ho - office ka rishta aur ghar ki shaan.

speaker: Seeker
text: Core conflict yeh hai ki main andar se phas gaya hoon. Lagta hai meri value hi khatam ho gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Relational preservation family-tied case mein trapped/helpless reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum bahut helpless feel kar rahe ho, jaise rishton ko bachate bachate khud ko kho rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, agar bol diya toh log bolenge badtameez hai. Isliye main chup rehta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue protocol: short restatement only.
text: Badtameezi ka tag lagne ka darr tumhe aur bandh kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: maine hamesha Ji Sir hi kaha
text: Bilkul, isliye har baar maine hamesha Ji Sir hi kaha, chahe andar se toot रहा था.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Urban migrant + crop loss + family shaan context normalize and worth separate.
text: Urban migrant isolation, ghar ka nuksan, aur shaan ka pressure ke beech aisa phasna bilkul common hai. Tumhari keemat kisi meeting ki beizzati se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda हल्का लगा, par aage ka first step अभी भी unclear hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: One-time systemic anecdote from same context to reduce isolation.
text: Urban migrants jo ghar ka remittance carry karte hain, unmein yeh pattern common hai - saamne sehna, baad mein टूटना; sirf tumhara nahi, par log ghar ki shaan ke liye bolte nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon? Aaj ke liye chhote practical steps chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness signal par 3 low-load options देना.
text: Aaj ke liye 3 tiny options: (1) 5 min slow breathing 4-in 6-out; (2) note pe sirf remittance date + amount likho; (3) trusted insaan ko 2-line message: 'pressure heavy hai, kal 10 min baat chahiye'. Jo easiest लगे pehle woh.

speaker: Seeker
text: Breathing se start karunga, saans heavy hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen suggestion step-by-step execute karwana once.
text: Pehle seedha baitho, shoulders dheele karo. Phir 4 count inhale aur 6 count exhale, 8 rounds karo. Phir bolo: 'abhi ek kadam kaafi hai'. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: 8 rounds ke baad pressure halka hai, dimag clearer lag रहा है.
